description_long: This is a modern two-story bungalow with a flat, overhanging roof and a clean, geometric design. The structure features large glass windows and sliding doors, providing ample natural light and a seamless connection between indoor and outdoor spaces. The front yard is landscaped with palm trees and a manicured lawn, while the backyard includes a spacious patio area with a swimming pool and lounge chairs. A detached garage sits to one side, connected by a paved driveway and walkway. The exterior is finished in neutral tones of gray and white, with subtle textural contrasts between the main building and the garage. The overall layout emphasizes open, functional living spaces and a strong relationship with the surrounding environment.
description: A modern two-story bungalow with flat roofs, large windows, a detached garage, and a landscaped yard featuring a pool and patio.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large windows, patio area, pool, and landscaped front yard with palm trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the detached garage, driveway, and the pool area enclosed by fencing and greenery.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back entrance, garage, and a row of windows facing the driveway and street.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the garage, driveway, and the pool area with surrounding landscaping.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding glass doors
